chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Family Transfer Appln. No. S – 06 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29.04.2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for Applicant Agha Ather Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Respondent, namely Mst. Balqees alias Saweera has appeared in response to notice and submits that she is residing at Kashmore and has to travel from there to Mehrabpur, District Naushahro Feroze only for meeting with her children. She has proposed that if the Guardian and Wards Application, which has already been decided and is pending only for the purpose of her meeting with her children, is transferred from Mehrabpur, District Naushahro Feroze to Civil / Family Judge, Sobhodero at Ranipur, District Khairpur, it would be convenient for her and applicant who is resident of Naushahro Feroze. Learned counsel for the applicant has recorded no objection. Accordingly, this application is allowed and Guardian & Wards Appln. No.12 of 2019 (Re- Mst. Balqees alias Saweera vs. Khalid Mehmood) is hereby withdrawn from the file of Civil / Family Judge, Mehrabpur and is transferred to Civil / Family Judge, Sobhodero at Ranipur, District Khairpur for meeting purpose as already ordered. Instant family transfer application is disposed of accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
